description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a semi-circular arrangement of flowering trees and lush green landscaping. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of white and beige exterior finishes. A driveway leads up to a garage on one side, while the main entrance is centrally located and easily accessible from the street. The backyard is enclosed by the tree line, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The property includes a small patio or outdoor seating area adjacent to the house. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with large windows, white and beige finishes, and a semi-circular border of flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the full semi-circular tree border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the depth of the backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and the continuous line of trees behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, side yard, and the curve of the tree border.
